# Sacramento Battery Incentive

Sacramento Battery Incentive is a customer-facing information and appointment website for Axia by Qcells solar and battery reviews in SMUD territory around Sacramento, California.

The site helps SMUD homeowners:

- Check whether solar plus home battery storage is worth a closer look.
- Review SMUD battery incentive timing, Solar and Storage Rate questions, backup-power priorities, and existing-solar storage options.
- Book a free in-home visit with Axia by Qcells.

Important distinction:

Axia Solar is not SMUD and does not claim to represent SMUD. Incentives are administered by SMUD and are subject to SMUD eligibility requirements, enrollment rules, approved-equipment requirements, program and funding availability, and final approval.

Primary pages:

- Home: https://sacramentobatteryincentive.com/
- Quick check: https://sacramentobatteryincentive.com/quick-check.html
- SMUD battery incentive guide: https://sacramentobatteryincentive.com/smud-battery-incentive.html
- SMUD Powerwall incentive review: https://sacramentobatteryincentive.com/smud-powerwall-incentive.html
- Add battery to existing solar: https://sacramentobatteryincentive.com/add-battery-to-existing-solar.html
- Sacramento solar battery storage: https://sacramentobatteryincentive.com/solar-battery-storage-sacramento.html
- Battery backup Sacramento: https://sacramentobatteryincentive.com/battery-backup-sacramento.html
- SMUD Solar and Storage Rate: https://sacramentobatteryincentive.com/smud-solar-and-storage-rate.html
- Sacramento city page: https://sacramentobatteryincentive.com/sacramento-smud-battery-incentive.html
- Elk Grove city page: https://sacramentobatteryincentive.com/elk-grove-smud-battery-incentive.html
- Rancho Cordova city page: https://sacramentobatteryincentive.com/rancho-cordova-smud-battery-incentive.html
- Citrus Heights city page: https://sacramentobatteryincentive.com/citrus-heights-smud-battery-incentive.html
- Carmichael city page: https://sacramentobatteryincentive.com/carmichael-smud-battery-incentive.html
- Folsom city page: https://sacramentobatteryincentive.com/folsom-smud-battery-incentive.html
- Fair Oaks city page: https://sacramentobatteryincentive.com/fair-oaks-smud-battery-incentive.html
- Orangevale city page: https://sacramentobatteryincentive.com/orangevale-smud-battery-incentive.html
- Privacy policy: https://sacramentobatteryincentive.com/privacy-policy.html

Official references:

- SMUD battery storage for homeowners: https://www.smud.org/Going-Green/Battery-storage/Homeowner
- SMUD Solar and Storage Rate: https://www.smud.org/Rate-Information/Solar-and-Storage-Rate
- Tesla SMUD Virtual Power Plant: https://www.tesla.com/support/energy/virtual-power-plant/smud

Contact:

- Phone: 385-777-9692
- Booking handoff: https://sacramentobatteryincentive.com/book.html
